notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom grounds into a double play, shortstop Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Vaughn Grissom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Kevin McGonigle scores. Dillon Dingler to 3rd. Riley Greene to 2nd. Riley Greene advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Jo Adell.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Kevin McGonigle scores. Dillon Dingler to 3rd. Riley Greene to 2nd. Riley Greene advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Jo Adell.

notableEvents.label: Kevin McGonigle GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kevin McGonigle grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Colt Keith out at 2nd. Kevin McGonigle out at 1st.
